description: You are logged into 2N Access Commander at https://localhost:9443 as the default administrator (username: admin, password: 2n). The property manager has requested that Victor Schulz, the lead shift supervisor from SecureGuard Services, be granted full administrative access to the software so he can manage user badges and review access logs. Enable system login access for the existing user Victor Schulz with the username 'vschulz', password 'SecurePass2026!', and the 'Administrator' role. Do not modify or delete the original 'admin' account, and do not create a duplicate Victor Schulz user.
